授業目的: This course provides an introduction to the study of Japanese food culture with an emphasis on development since the mid-19th century. Through analyzing Japanese food culture it will also examine such concepts as authenticity, hybridity, gentrification, and ethnicity.
到達目標: After taking this course students will gain a general understanding of the historical development of Japanese food culture. They will also have learned to apply analytical concepts critically to the study of social and cultural history.

第1回: Watch & be prepared to discuss in class.
第15回: [Flex] Fieldwork: Chinese, Korean, Indian, Vietnamese restaurants

教科書/Required texts0: Readings available in LUNA or free online.
成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.
成績評価Grading2: プレゼンテーション・発表／Presentation (07)

name: 【300】総合日本学習科目（日本の食文化）／JSC Japanese Food Culture
担当者: ツー　ティモシー（TSU TIMOTHY YUN HUI）
